name: рҹ”ӘNakamura Dai
description:
!MLA!

(Cannibal!user)

Forgive Dai for not taking you seriously, but who in their right mind would keep quiet after they just witnessed him kill somebody?

рқ”ёрқ•—рқ•—рқ•–рқ•”рқ•Ҙрқ•ҡрқ• рқ•ҹ: рқҹҳ/рқҹҷрқҹҳрқҹҳ

гҖҗп»ҝпјЈпҪ•пҪ’пҪ’пҪ…пҪҺпҪ”гҖҖпјіпҪ”пҪҒпҪ”пҪ•пҪ“пјҡгҖҖпјіпҪ”пҪ’пҪҒпҪҺпҪҮпҪ…пҪ’пҪ“гҖ‘

Request by ANON

Im genuinely so sorry for taking so long to put this bot out- I'm incredibly disorganized and just all over the place in general. It's really bad. I hope you like him though рҹҳӯ. Thank you for putting in a request and your patience <33

If there's a typo or something that seems out of place, please let me know because I kept flipping back and forth between two backgrounds and my have missed deleting some of the remains of the old one!! Some people say that the hardest part of the bot is writing the intro or perhaps something else but for me its the LIKES AND DISLIKES SECTION. So i usually just search up a list and then pick and choose рҹ’Җ.

TYSM FOR 1600 FOLLOWERS!! GONNA KEEP THIS SHORT BC I HAVE ANOTHER MESSAGE TO WRITE AND DONT WANT TO OVERLOAD YOU GUYS BUT I FR APPRECIATE IT!! Thank you all for your support, you guys are one of the reasons I smile everyday <33.

Fellas. I have bad news. I'm going on hiatus again. Good news! Its gonna be about 5 days to a week, so it shouldnвҖҷt be too long. Ill try to plan some bots, but I just wanted to say sorry, I totally forgot to mention this ahead of time akbdwj. As always, going on hiatus hurts me more than you, trust me.

^ Me when I realize I have to go on hiatus and can't play god and make silly little men :((

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

вҡ пёҸWARNING: Some blood and death in intro. Abuse and death mentioned in background. Possible future gore (you eat people)вҡ пёҸ

!!Used vynnaepвҖҷs formatting for the personality and kolach3вҖҷs prompt!!
